ok  	github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/server	0.025s

verification_command passed: cd cli && go test ./internal/server/ -run 'TestRunBundleFile|TestRunToolCalls|TestSessionIndexEntryFromResult|TestResolveRunBundlePath|TestRunBundleFiles_Listing' -count=1
rationale: Bead ddx-27936512 is a duplicate of work already merged in commit 0b1b3964
("feat(server): run-detail resolver + tool-call persistence + bundle-file
confinement [ddx-6d132f62]"). All four acceptance criteria are already
satisfied by existing code:

AC1: Run resolver returns full detail (lossless)
  - cli/internal/server/state_runs_detail.go:250 loadRunDetail() populates
    prompt/response/stderr from session bodies and bundleFiles via
    listRunBundleFiles(); invoked from state_runs.go:520 on run(id:) lookup.
  - cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_runs.go wires Run, RunToolCalls,
    RunBundleFile resolvers to the state methods.

AC2: ToolCallEntry persisted at drain time (NOT log-parsing)
  - agent.SessionIndexEntry carries a ToolCalls []ToolCallEntry field;
    SessionIndexEntryFromResult copies result.ToolCalls into the entry,
    so the persistence happens once at drain time rather than on each
    resolver call. GetRunToolCallsGraphQL reads only the persisted slice.

AC3: bundleFile endpoint refuses path traversal
  - resolveRunBundlePath (state_runs_detail.go:111) rejects absolute paths,
    "..", paths whose Clean escapes the root, and symlink targets that
    EvalSymlinks resolves outside bundleRoot. Surfaced via
    GetRunBundleFileGraphQL → Query.runBundleFile.

AC4: Tests cover all three
  - state_runs_detail_test.go covers: dotdot/absolute/under-workdir
    rejection, symlink-escape rejection, size cap (>64KB → truncated=true),
    whitelist enforcement (only allowed extensions inline), missing-path
    404, bundleFiles listing with size+mime, drain-time tool-call
    persistence (TestRunToolCalls_PersistedAtDrain and
    TestSessionIndexEntryFromResult_PersistsToolCalls), and the
    resolveRunBundlePath helper directly. All pass at base-rev b10e224f.
